original_question: What does CELEX 31997R2316 state regarding the matter described in the excerpt?
enhanced_question: In accordance with Article 12 of Directive 1997/71/EC (CELEX number 31997R2316), what specific provisions and obligations are imposed upon Member States, as well as the competent authority, in relation to the implementation and enforcement of measures aimed at preventing the unfair commercial practices that may be described in the provided excerpt?
variants: Under the framework of Article 12 of Directive 1997/71/EC, what specific legislative requirements and administrative duties are incumbent upon Member States and the relevant regulatory agency in relation to the implementation and enforcement of measures designed to prevent unfair commercial practices as outlined in the provided text?

In light of Article 12 of Directive 1997/71/EC, what particular obligations and procedural guidelines must be fulfilled by Member States and the competent authority with regard to the administration and enforcement of countermeasures aimed at preventing deceptive business practices as described in the excerpt?

original_question: What does CELEX 32009R0295 state regarding the matter described in the excerpt?
enhanced_question: In accordance with Article 29 of Directive 2009/29/EC (CELEX 32009R0295), what specific provisions, if any, relate to the protection of personal data in the context of online advertising and targeted direct marketing, as described in the provided excerpt?
variants: Does Article 29 of Directive 2009/29/EC provide specific rules governing the processing of personal data in relation to online advertising and targeted direct marketing, as outlined in the provided text?

In light of Article 29 of Directive 2009/29/EC, what provisions are in place to regulate the use of personal data for targeted direct marketing and online advertising, as described in the provided excerpt?
